---
title: "Sunoj Shajahan"
output:
  html_document:
    set_title: "My Title!"
    # toc: true
    theme: default
    # toc_float: true
---

```{r load_packages, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE} 
library(fontawesome)
```

![](./images/myphoto.jpg#right){width=45%}

<!-- # **Sunoj Shajahan** <br> -->

### Postdoctoral associate <br>
[Nutrient Management Spear Program](http://nmsp.cals.cornell.edu/), <br>
[Department of Animal Science](https://cals.cornell.edu/sunoj-shajahan), <br>
Cornell University, Ithaca, NY 14853. <br>
Email: ss2678[at]cornell.edu <br>

# [`r fa("github", fill = "black")`](https://github.com/sunojshajahan)     [`r fa("twitter", fill = "#1DA1F2")`](https://twitter.com/sunojshajahan)  [`r fa("researchgate", fill = "#0cb")`](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Sunoj-Shajahan-2)    

[Sunoj Shajahan CV](SunojCV_July5_2022.pdf)


### My research
I work on precision agriculture projects at NMSP, particularly on developing an alternative approach to estimate and predict corn grain and silage yield at the sub-field level. I make use of time-series aerial imageries from unmanned aerial systems (UAS) and low earth orbit satellites. Along with these imageries, I am interested in understanding the interaction between other data layers, such as weather, topography, and landforms, with the yield monitor data. My goal is to develop farm-specific yield models by training with multi-year yield monitor data and remotely sensed data layers. I am exploring big data analytics using cloud computing to analyze and build such models.

<!-- ![](./images/myphoto.jpg#right){width=45%} -->

### Updates

+ August 19, 2022:
My intern, [Ibtida Ahmed](./images/Ibtida_1.jpeg), Junior at SUNY, Buffalo, completed his internship with us. Good luck for his new semester!.
<!-- ![](./images/Ibtida_1.jpeg#center){height=15%} -->

+ August 5, 2022:
The interns at NMSP organized a [picnic at Stewart Park](./images/Interns_social_Aug52022.jpeg) on their last day with us for this summer semester.
<!-- ![](./images/Interns_social_Aug52022.jpeg#center){width=65%} -->

+ August 4, 2022:
Aileen Randolph from [New York Farm Viability Institute](https://nyfvi.org/) joined our [team meeting](./images/Aileen_NYFVI_Aug42022.jpeg) and gave us a talk about grant funding opportunities at NYFVI.

<!-- ![](./images/Aileen_NYFVI_Aug42022.jpeg#center){width=65%} -->

+ August 4, 2022:
Interns at NMSP wrapped up their stint with us with a [mini symposium](./images/Intern_wrap_Aug42022.jpeg).


<!-- ![](./images/Intern_wrap_Aug42022.jpeg#center){width=65%} -->





<!-- # My mentorship -->

<!-- ## Student 1 -->
<!-- ## Student 2 -->
<!-- ## Student 3 -->
<!-- ## Student 4 -->
